notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the curl SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 6 CVEs: CVE-2022-43552, CVE-2023-23916, CVE-2023-27535, CVE-2023-27536, CVE-2023-28321, and 1 more.
notes.title: Description
